markdown.markdown:
::::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](/images/keck_med_seal.png){.absolute width="55"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} `Jun 2025 - Present`{style="float: right;"} **USC's Neuroimaging and Informatics Institute, Los Angeles CA**
Resource Employee, Laboratory of NeuroImaging
- Built and maintained a secure Linux-based research server - Deployed and managed an imaging informatics platform (XNAT) ::: :::::
::::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](/images/chla_logo.png){.absolute width="55"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} `Jun 2025 - Present`{style="float: right;"} **Children's Hospital Los Angeles, Los Angeles CA**
Research Assistant, Computational Imaging of Brain Organization Research Group
- Processing Magnetic Resonance (MR) images of infant brains (ages 0-18). - Automated neuroimaging preprocessing pipelines using containerized software. - Optimized data infrastructure in High-Performance Computing environment. - Implemented data quality checks, supporting the development and validation of image segmentation models ::: :::::
::::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](/images/mgh_logo.png){.absolute width="55"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} `Oct 2022 - Jul 2024`{style="float: right;"} **Massachusetts General Hospital, Boston MA**
Programmer, Center for Addiction Medicine
- End-to-end data pipeline design and implementation (version-controlled with Git) to ingest, clean, and analyze incoming clinical trial data. - Developed and automated applications (in R Shiny) to monitor data ingestion, detect anomlaies, improve data cleaning and visualization. - Compiled and harmonized longitudinal datasets to ensure consistency across all timepoints and enable cross-cohort comparisons. - Collaborated with the Biostatistician and Principal Investigator on statistical analyses for primary, exploratory, and ad-hoc analyses. - Led recurring data review meetings to identify systematic data issues and implement improvements in data processing and analysis workflows. - Managed and reviewed clinical trial databses through programming and Electronic Data Capture platforms (REDCap) with an oversight on data quality. - Trained and mentored programmers on code reproducibility, data querying and manipulation, and best research practices. ::: :::::
::::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](/images/barilan_logo.png){.absolute width="55"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} **Bar-Ilan University, Tel-Aviv - Israel** `Aug 2020 - Dec 2020`{style="float: right;"}
Research Intern, Developmental Neuropsychology Lab
- Data processing, cleaning, and analysis for eye-tracking data to measure EEG and gaze coordination patterns using repeated measures ANOVA. ::: :::::
